api_metadata.data_disclaimer: T&C data is AI-extracted from supplier documents. Verify critical information with the supplier directly.

validation.note: Validation against annotation_base.json — keyword matching on extracted values.

tpl_amount.ai_source_text: Goldcar may be obliged to incur as a consequence
tpl_amount.annotation_note: T&C states compulsory insurance included only — no specific amount. COB 2026 ES lookup required.

grace_period_minutes.annotation_note: 6 hours = 360 minutes. Unusually long vs Sixt (60 min) and Hertz (59 min). This is a BOOKING GUARANTEE, not a classic grace period. Out-of-hours pickup incurs additional fees. Term used: 'garantizará tu reserva' — not 'grace period'.

licence_rules.ai_value: Minimum age 21. US/Canadian drivers need IDP. Digital licences accepted if via miDGT app.
licence_rules.ai_source_text: The age of the driving licence and the duration of the rental agreement
licence_rules.expected_value: Min. age 21 for ALL vehicles. Licence held min. 1 year. Physical licence always required. Digital licences only accepted if Spanish DGT via miDGT app. US/Canadian: IDP (1949 Geneva Convention Annex 10) + national licence required.
licence_rules.annotation_note: Goldcar minimum is 21 for ALL vehicles — stricter than Sixt/Hertz (18). Digital licences: ONLY Spanish DGT via miDGT app. All other digital licences rejected.

payment_rules.ai_value: Accepted: Debit and Credit cards (VISA, MasterCard). Rejected: Maestro, prepaid cards, Amex.
payment_rules.ai_source_text: The methods of payment accepted for your rental are: Debit card, Credit card VISA or Maste
payment_rules.expected_value: Visa and Mastercard ONLY (credit and debit). Amex, Diners Club, Maestro, Postepay, prepaid cards, virtual cards, cash NOT accepted at counter. Two credit cards required for premium vehicles (F6, G1, G3, G5, G6, H6, J1, J3, K3, T6, U3, U5, Y3).
payment_rules.annotation_note: Goldcar ONLY accepts Visa and Mastercard — significantly narrower than Sixt or Hertz. Critical for fine-tuning: do not generalise Sixt/Hertz card lists to Goldcar.

cross_border_conditions.ai_value: Authorized countries: Andorra, France, Italy, Portugal, Gibraltar. Formentera and Ibiza prohibited.
cross_border_conditions.ai_source_text: the client can access, as long as they have contracted the 'Cross-Border' coverage
cross_border_conditions.expected_value: 5 countries only: Andorra, France (continental), Italy (continental), Portugal (continental), Gibraltar. Cross-Border coverage + express branch authorisation required. GPS tracking enforced — contract auto-terminated on violation. Formentera and Ibiza: NEVER permitted. Canary Islands and Balearics (excl. Formentera/Ibiza): permitted with Cross-Border coverage.
cross_border_conditions.annotation_note: Most restrictive cross-border policy of the 3 suppliers. GPS enforcement explicitly stated — contract auto-terminated on violation. Goldcar may take remote legal action to recover vehicle.
